title: Senior Finance Business Analyst
salary_range: salary for the position is determined based on
meta_description: Take the next step in your career as a Senior Finance Business Analyst at Helen Oy, located in Helsinki. Apply now and get started.
description: We are looking for an experienced and analytical Senior Finance Business Analyst at Helen Oy in Helsinki, Finland. This role involves developing group-level financial reporting, analytics, and financial data models while ensuring their functionality in strategic guidance, forecasting, and decision-making. The ideal candidate has 5-7 years of experience in financial analytics, reporting, or working with financial forecasting models. They should have strong knowledge of financial data, dimensions, key figures, and be skilled in designing and developing financial reports, dashboards (Power BI), and interpreting financial information for different stakeholders.
what_we_expect: 5-7 years of experience in financial analytics, reporting, or working with financial forecasting models.
Strong knowledge of financial data, dimensions, key figures, and the ability to visualize entities.
Experience with data analytics and reporting tools (e.g., Power BI, SQL, Python, Databricks).
Ability to build clear, user-friendly, and visually functional dashboards.
Ability to change complex financial information into an understandable and decision-making entity.
Strong cooperation and communication skills, including the ability to act as a credible sparring partner.
job_responsibilities: Develop group-level financial reporting, analytics, and the financial data model.
Ensure that business reports are based on common, agreed financial figures.
Design and develop financial reports, dashboards, and Power BI for different stakeholders.
what_we_offer: Central and influential role in developing group's financial visibility and guidance.
Direct impact on how financial information is used in decision-making at different levels of the organization.
Competent, relaxed, and cooperative community of experts.
Involved in building the future of clean and sustainable energy.
Various employee benefits including electricity for employees, charity work day, remote working abroad, and welfare benefit.
search_keywords: Senior Finance Business Analyst Helen Group Finland Clean Energy

title: Maintenance specialist, relay protection
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Start your next career step as a Maintenance specialist, relay protection at Helen Oy. Great opportunity in Helsinki—apply now.
description: Helen Oy is seeking a Maintenance Specialist specializing in relay protection for their Helsinki-based subsidiary Helen Sähköverko. This role involves defining, maintaining, and developing the electrical network’s relay protection system, analyzing operation after disturbances, participating in maintenance activities, and supporting operations centers during disruptions. The ideal candidate has extensive knowledge of 400 kV, 110 kV, and substation secondary systems, including protective relays and automation components. They should possess excellent communication skills, cooperation with various stakeholders, and experience with network calculation software and enterprise resource planning systems.
what_we_expect: Extensive and in-depth knowledge of relay protection of the electrical network (400 kV, 110 kV and kj)
Experience with substation secondary system components, including protective relays and substation automation
job_responsibilities: Definition, maintenance and development of the relay protection of the electrical network
Analyze the operation of the relay protection after disturbances
Participate as a representative of the customer organization in daily maintenance activities, planning, procurement and implementation phases of substation projects
what_we_offer: Central role in the development of our capital's electricity distribution network
Flexible working hours and remote or office work options
Active development of own expertise through industry trainings, learning from each other, and sharing views with others
search_keywords: maintenance specialist, relay protection, Helen Sähköverko, clean transition, renewable energy solutions, electric transport, substation environment, enterprise resource planning systems

title: Project Manager / Business Expert
salary_range: KVTES standard salary €4294.63/month + possible work experience bonuses
meta_description: Apply now for a Project manager / business expert role at Ylivieskan kaupunki. Join a growing team and build your career in Ylivieska.
description: Ylivieskan kaupunki is seeking a Project Manager / Business Expert to join their team in Ylivieska. This role involves implementing the Ylivieska city's share in the Get Your Wings - Internationalization incentive for smaller companies project, which aims to increase companies' understanding of international business and initiate new internationalization measures in the region. The successful candidate will work closely with companies and operators in both regions, contact companies smoothly, and help SMEs in the early stages of internationalization through concrete tools, workshops, and company-specific sparring sessions.
what_we_expect: Experience or know-how in companies' international business and export
Good communication, interaction, and networking skills
Active and self-initiated approach to work
job_responsibilities: Implement the Ylivieska city's share in the Get Your Wings - Internationalization incentive for smaller companies project

Contact companies smoothly and move actively in the business field, helping SMEs in the region in the early stages of internationalization with concrete tools, workshops, and company-specific sparring sessions

Manage and coordinate the project tendering, activation, practical planning, implementation of workshops, trainings, events, cooperation with experts and partners, implementing communication and reporting, documenting results
what_we_offer: The opportunity to work directly on the growth and internationalization of companies
A wide cooperation network (companies, experts, developer organizations)
The opportunity to influence the vitality of the region and the growth of companies
A competent and encouraging work community
The benefits of a stable employer in the city of Ylivieska
search_keywords: project manager business expert ylivieska get your wings internationalization incentive smaller companies project

title: Electrician for industry
salary_range: salary The works will start according to the ag
meta_description: Start your next career step as a Electrician for industry at Eezy henkilöstöpalvelut Oy. Great opportunity in Lappeenranta—apply now.
description: We are looking for experienced electricians with electrical education, several years of experience in electrical installations, valid electrical qualifications and cards, ability to work independently, careful and responsible approach to work, and a B driver's license. We value professional pride, a safe way of working, and firm approaches to the job. This position offers versatile tasks, opportunities to work in different types of locations, support from a professional organization, and competitive salary. The works will start according to the agreement and continue until the end of the year. If you're interested, please send your application at eezy.fi and briefly tell us about your experience.
what_we_expect: Careful and responsible approach to work
job_responsibilities: Perform electrical installations and maintenance tasks in various locations, such as commercial, industrial and public buildings
Handle installation work professionally from start to finish at customer sites
Be responsible for the high-quality implementation of the work
what_we_offer: The opportunity to work in different types of locations
search_keywords: electrician, industry, South Karelia, temporary employment, electrical installations, experience, qualifications, driver's license
